node.title: Anyone else got this particular update from uber after oa?

article.title: Anyone else got this particular update from uber after oa?
article.content:
![image.png](https://assets.leetcode.com/users/images/d6c225cb-8a47-4ce1-bfc6-f4f2d7e488ca_1755414525.8626568.png)

Does not seem like a rejection, but idk what to take out of it. Anyone else got the same?

post.content: I also got same, solved all 3/3 Questions.
I got the same but I feel it is a sugar-coated rejection mail

this means that they are interviewing the top candidates (who have solved all three , i don't exactly what they look for becuase many candidates who solved all the questions but still did not receive update ) and if they fail in next round we will get the opputunity and if all the seats got filled then maybe we will not get the chance . 

uber is just wanted to get best candidates .

But I am preety sure the interview will be extremely hard

Got the Same mail, Some folks have already received rejection mails, so there\u2019s a chance decisions are still being rolled out. But don\u2019t set your hopes too high just yet \u2014 the process can go either way.
That means you are not the part of the brightest minds chosen for the role. May be you will get a chance!
